mapper.sql: CASE B.BIZ_PRGRS_STEP_CD WHEN 'PRE_WORK' THEN '사전작업' WHEN 'ORDER' THEN '수주' WHEN 'CLOSE' THEN '종료' WHEN 'FREE_MAINT' THEN '무상유지보수' WHEN 'PAID_MAINT' THEN '유상유지보수' ELSE B.BIZ_PRGRS_STEP_CD END AS BIZ_PRGRS_STEP_NM ,CASE B.BIZ_STTS_CD WHEN 'READY' THEN '준비' WHEN 'PRGRS' THEN '진행' WHEN 'CMPTN' THEN '완료' WHEN 'HOLD' THEN '보류' WHEN 'CANCEL' THEN '취소' ELSE B.BIZ_STTS_CD END AS BIZ_STTS_NM
mapper.select: SELECT B.* ,DATE_FORMAT(B.REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REG_DT ,DATE_FORMAT(B.MDFCN_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS MDFCN_DT , FROM biz_info B WHERE B.BIZ_SN = #{bizSn} AND B.USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_info SET USE_YN = 'N', MDFR_ID = #{mdfrId}, MDFCN_DT = NOW() WHERE BIZ_SN = #{bizSn}
mapper.select:
SELECT C.* ,CASE C.CUST_SE_CD WHEN 'PUBLIC' THEN '공공' WHEN 'PRIVATE' THEN '민간' ELSE C.CUST_SE_CD END AS CUST_SE_NM ,DATE_FORMAT(C.REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REG_DT ,DATE_FORMAT(C.MDFCN_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS MDFCN_DT FROM cust_info C WHERE C.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND ( C.CUST_CO_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR C.BRNO LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR C.RPRSV_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') )
AND C.CUST_SE_CD = #{searchCustSeCd}
ORDER BY C.CUST_CO_NM ASC
SELECT C.* FROM cust_info C WHERE C.CUST_SN = #{custSn} AND C.USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE cust_info SET USE_YN = 'N', MDFR_ID = #{mdfrId}, MDFCN_DT = NOW() WHERE CUST_SN = #{custSn}
mapper.select: SELECT R.* ,R.SORT_SEQ AS REL_SORT_SEQ ,C.CUST_CO_NM ,C.CUST_SE_CD ,C.BRNO ,C.RPRSV_NM ,C.TELNO ,CASE WHEN R.REL_SE_CD = 'END_USER' THEN '최종 발주처' WHEN R.REL_SE_CD = 'PRIME_CTRTR' THEN '1차 계약자' WHEN R.REL_SE_CD = 'SUB_CTRTR' AND R.REL_LVL >= 2 THEN CONCAT('하도급 ', R.REL_LVL - 1, '차') WHEN R.REL_SE_CD = 'SUB_CTRTR' THEN '하도급사' WHEN R.REL_SE_CD = 'OUR_CO' THEN '우리 회사' ELSE '기타' END AS REL_SE_NM FROM biz_cust_rel R INNER JOIN cust_info C ON R.CUST_SN = C.CUST_SN AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE R.BIZ_SN = #{bizSn} AND R.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY R.SORT_SEQ ASC, R.REL_LVL ASC, R.BIZ_CUST_REL_SN ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_cust_rel ( BIZ_SN, CUST_SN, REL_SE_CD, REL_LVL, SORT_SEQ, DIRECT_CTRT_YN, OUR_CO_YN ,RMRK_CN, USE_YN, RGTR_ID, REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{bizSn}, #{custSn}, #{relSeCd}, IFNULL(#{relLvl}, 0), IFNULL(#{relSortSeq}, 1), IFNULL(#{directCtrtYn}, 'N'), IFNULL(#{ourCoYn}, 'N') ,#{rmrkCn}, 'Y', #{rgtrId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_cust_rel SET USE_YN = 'N', MDFR_ID = #{mdfrId}, MDFCN_DT = NOW() WHERE BIZ_CUST_REL_SN = #{bizCustRelSn}
mapper.select: SELECT M.* ,U.USER_NM ,CASE M.INPUT_SE_CD WHEN 'MAIN' THEN '정' WHEN 'SUB' THEN '부' WHEN 'CONTRACT' THEN '계약직' WHEN 'OUTSRC' THEN '외주' ELSE M.INPUT_SE_CD END AS INPUT_SE_NM ,CASE M.BIZ_PRGRS_STEP_CD WHEN 'PRE_WORK' THEN '사전작업' WHEN 'ORDER' THEN '수주' WHEN 'CLOSE' THEN '종료' WHEN 'FREE_MAINT' THEN '무상유지보수' WHEN 'PAID_MAINT' THEN '유상유지보수' ELSE M.BIZ_PRGRS_STEP_CD END AS BIZ_PRGRS_STEP_NM FROM biz_mnpw M LEFT JOIN user_info U ON M.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE M.BIZ_SN = #{bizSn} AND M.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY M.INPUT_BGNG_YMD ASC, M.BIZ_MNPW_SN ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_mnpw SET USE_YN = 'N', MDFR_ID = #{mdfrId}, MDFCN_DT = NOW() WHERE BIZ_MNPW_SN = #{bizMnpwSn}
mapper.select: SELECT C.* ,CASE C.CST_SE_CD WHEN 'BTEXP' THEN '출장비' WHEN 'LDG_CST' THEN '숙박비' WHEN 'MEAL_CST' THEN '식대' WHEN 'MEETING_CST' THEN '회의비' WHEN 'ENTERTAIN' THEN '접대비' WHEN 'MTCO' THEN '재료비' WHEN 'ETC_CST' THEN '기타비용' ELSE C.CST_SE_CD END AS CST_SE_NM FROM biz_cst C WHERE C.BIZ_SN = #{bizSn} AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY C.OCRN_YMD DESC, C.BIZ_CST_SN DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_cst SET USE_YN = 'N', MDFR_ID = #{mdfrId}, MDFCN_DT = NOW() WHERE BIZ_CST_SN = #{bizCstSn}
mapper.select: SELECT S.* ,U.USER_NM AS PIC_NM ,CASE S.SCHDL_SE_CD WHEN 'PRE_WORK' THEN '사전작업' WHEN 'SUPPORT' THEN '지원' WHEN 'REG_MAINT' THEN '정기유지보수' WHEN 'ISSUE' THEN '장애대응' ELSE S.SCHDL_SE_CD END AS SCHDL_SE_NM FROM biz_schdl S LEFT JOIN user_info U ON S.PIC_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE S.BIZ_SN = #{bizSn} AND S.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY S.SCHDL_BGNG_YMD ASC, S.BIZ_SCHDL_SN ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_schdl SET USE_YN = 'N', MDFR_ID = #{mdfrId}, MDFCN_DT = NOW() WHERE BIZ_SCHDL_SN = #{bizSchdlSn}
mapper.select: SELECT B.BIZ_SN ,B.CTRT_AMT ,B.VAT_INCL_YN ,IFNULL(CST.DIRECT_CST_SUM, 0) AS DIRECT_CST_SUM ,IFNULL(MNPW.LABOR_CST_SUM, 0) AS LABOR_CST_SUM ,IFNULL(CST.DIRECT_CST_SUM, 0) + IFNULL(MNPW.LABOR_CST_SUM, 0) AS TOTAL_CST_SUM ,B.CTRT_AMT - (IFNULL(CST.DIRECT_CST_SUM, 0) + IFNULL(MNPW.LABOR_CST_SUM, 0)) AS PROFIT_AMT ,CASE WHEN B.CTRT_AMT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((B.CTRT_AMT - (IFNULL(CST.DIRECT_CST_SUM, 0) + IFNULL(MNPW.LABOR_CST_SUM, 0))) / B.CTRT_AMT * 100, 2) END AS PROFIT_RATE FROM biz_info B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BIZ_SN, SUM(OCRN_CST) AS DIRECT_CST_SUM FROM biz_cst WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY BIZ_SN ) CST ON B.BIZ_SN = CST.BIZ_SN LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BIZ_SN, SUM(INPUT_MCNT * UNTPRC) AS LABOR_CST_SUM FROM biz_mnpw WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY BIZ_SN ) MNPW ON B.BIZ_SN = MNPW.BIZ_SN WHERE B.BIZ_SN = #{bizSn} AND B.USE_YN = 'Y'
